TEMPO_COUNT.description: Your current Tempo ({tempoIcon}) count. [pink]Beat's[/pink] cards may require Tempo to play or benefit from it.
TEMPO_COUNT.title: Tempo
TEMPO_STATIC.description: A resource gained from [gold]Melodic Flow[/gold]. [pink]Beat's[/pink] cards may cost Tempo to play or benefit from it.
TEMPO_STATIC.title: Tempo
MELODIC_FLOW_RHYTHM.description: A [gold]Melodic Flow[/gold] state entered by playing a card with a different type than your last played card. Playing a card while already in Rhythm grants 1 [gold]Tempo[/gold].
MELODIC_FLOW_RHYTHM.title: Rhythm
MELODIC_FLOW_RESONANCE.description: A [gold]Melodic Flow[/gold] state entered by playing a card with the same type as your last played card.
MELODIC_FLOW_RESONANCE.title: Resonance
MELODIC_FLOW_SILENCE.description: A [gold]Melodic Flow[/gold] state that counts as both [gold]Rhythm[/gold] and [gold]Resonance[/gold]. Card cost is reduced by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and increased by [img]res://BeatCharacterMod/images/packed/sprite_fonts/tempo_icon.png[/img][img]res://BeatCharacterMod/images/packed/sprite_fonts/tempo_icon.png[/img]. Ends when you run out of [gold]Tempo[/gold].
MELODIC_FLOW_SILENCE.title: Silence
MELODIC_FLOW.description: A state of [gold]Rhythm[/gold] and [gold]Resonance[/gold] that changes based on the last played card type.
MELODIC_FLOW.title: Melodic Flow
